reviews.feedback: Missing dedicated error counter. Also need explicit W3CTraceContextPropagator in the tracing config, not relying on defaults.
Single /health endpoint, console.log monitoring, no Prometheus, no tracing. Typical baseline.
Good SLO-based alerts but need runbooks for ALL alerts, not just the main ones. Every alert must have a runbook annotation.
Arbitrary thresholds, no burn rates, no runbooks, no escalation policy. Average latency instead of P99.
Good multi-language support but correlation IDs need to be in log output, not just on the request object. Also OTLP endpoint should use env var in all services.
Used X-Request-ID instead of W3C traceparent. All services got Node.js config despite Python requirement. No spans, no exporter.
